content:
✔ Cross-cultural interactions (How did Eastern & Western traditions intersect during this period?)

🔍 Writing Evolution Section

This will track how literature evolved through time by focusing on:
✔ Inventions & technological shifts (Printing press, radio, TV, internet, AI, etc.)
✔ Changes in audience consumption & literacy rates
✔ Shifts in storytelling structure and purpose

For example:
📖 The Printing Press & the Renaissance → Mass Literacy & the Rise of the Novel
📖 The Industrial Revolution → Serialized Fiction, Penny Dreadfuls, & Journalism
📖 The Digital Age → Hypertext, Internet Fiction, & AI-Generated Writing

🔍 Final Steps Before I Build the Complete Macro Plan
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 4 (chunk 4/555)
